description: This file defines a Bootstrap Button component class, including its methods, event handling, and integration with jQuery.

classes.name: Button
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages toggle behavior and jQuery interface for Bootstrap buttons.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the 'active' class and updates the 'aria-pressed' attribute accordingly.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery to initialize or invoke methods on Button instances.
